items.name_en: NEVERFULL The Classic King #N41358# Uninspected Version
items.name_cn:
NEVERFULL The Classic King #N41358# Uninspected Version
Dimensions: 31*28*14cm▪️
Known as the 'King of Value'
The Neverfull shopping bag every woman should own is indeed true; it is not only the daily versatile king but also meets the demand for large capacity, fully practical for commuting with a perfect rating!
As a mother-and-child bag, the small bag inside can be removed and carried separately, a value king with multiple uses!

items.name_en: 🆕 【 M21060 Blue】For this winter, this LV Pillow Palm Springs mini backpack is crafted with comfortable padded Econyl recycled nylon, embellished with a Monogram embroidery pattern. Soft handles and an adjustable canvas shoulder strap offer versatile styling options, releasing a dynamic style at home, on the street, or at ski resorts. Detailed features 17 x 22 x 10 cm (Length x Height x Width) Z.

items.name_cn:
🆕 【Bloom Bucket Bag】M13843 Black
Combining smooth calfskin and Monogram canvas trim, it establishes its identity with a Monogram floral base and shiny metal hardware, inspired by the brand's Silhouette heel silhouette. The chic structure accommodates a phone and other daily essentials, while a detachable shoulder strap and handle offer multiple carrying options.
Size: 16 x 21 x 21 cm
